title: QUANTITY SURVEYOR (2 Months Contract)
description:
*2 Months Contract*

*Tuas Boulevard Shipyard*


Responsibilities:

  • Maintain Project cost control documentation, monitor, measure and report ongoing Contract costs to the Project Manager.
  • Monitoring the impact of ongoing agreed costing against the provisional Contract price.
  • Assistance in agreeing and closing out the final Contract account with shipyard.
  • Verification of Contract drawing, specifications and work completion documentation against provisional Contract costs.
  • Prepare and maintain a register for the status of work completion documentation.
  • Updating of project cost reporting relative to work completion documentation.
  • Work closely with the Contractors QS group to discuss budget allocation should additional Contract works be required.
  • The updating of Project cost reports and budget relative to any additional work scope.
  • The evaluation and agreement of the Contractors remeasurement documentation.
  • The updating of Project cost reports with remeasured quantities.
  • Onboard verifications with Contractors QS team as and when required
  • The allocation of work completion documentation against the Contract BOQ.
  • The verification of work completion documentation issued by the Contractor and approved by the Clients nominated site team representatives.
  • The updating of project cost reports against the actual work carried out.


Requirements:

  • Qualifications in quantity surveying or equivalent
  • Previous experience relative to FPSO, FSO, FSRU or FSU conversion Projects will be advantageous
  • Previous experience in working as a member of the Clients site based PMT in a Singapore shipyard environment will be advantageous
  • Experience of working in a multi discipline multinational environment.

postedCompany.description:
Austen Maritime Services provide a range of port agency, tow management, heavy lifting and bespoke technical services, and act as local representative on behalf of owners, charterers and operators of many vessel types.

Our niche expertise is to provide payroll services.  We currently administer more than 5,000 seagoing and shore based contract personnel.  For project personnel assigned to Singapore, we assist with a wide range of expatriate services such as welcome orientation, accommodation, school selection, car rental, utilities, employment pass, dependent pass, travel and many other services.

Our customer focus is mainly offshore oil and gas companies, shipping and maritime industries, engineering companies and independent contractors providing specialist support to all these sectors.  We have many repeat customers who place great trust and confidence in our reliability and professionalism.  All our customers are unique and we add value and customize our solutions by understanding their specific business needs and requirements.
postedCompany.name: AUSTEN MARITIME SERVICES PTE LTD
